title: Algorithmic Problems, Contracts, and Evidence · Cost-Model Clinic: Problem Specification
summary: Turn vague routing and lookup requests into measurable input-output problems. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa problem specification increment in an algorithm contract and adversarial case catalog. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Specify inputs, outputs, preconditions, postconditions, and invalid cases before selecting an algorithm.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
